description: Originally launched on Solana in Q1 2021, Raydium (RAY) is the native token of the Automated Market Maker (AMM) and decentralized exchange (DEX) – Raydium. Now, as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 RAY gives original RAY holders, users, and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Raydium
